name: SCC_ServiceDiscoveryRes
title: SCC_ServiceDiscoveryRes
syntax: void SCC_ServiceDiscoveryRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode, long ServiceCount )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Service Discovery Response is received.
Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with the following functions:

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
